h7f523b26ga2b9g4888g8588g10c107b2a09e: This devil Raphael flaunts his paltry wings, as if he wants to impress us.
h51040ae2g3124g4ec1gaacdg0c4909ace4bd: You saw the red dragons slaying his infernal kin above Hell's fires, did you not?
h829c0aa3gece1g4ac8gb290gc2cb7bd0504d: Next to a dragon, the devil's a gnat. When I am kith'rak, I will take my Queen Vlaakith his head as a trophy.
h28435b39gc092g4811ga21fg44565b25109d: Githyanki knights. The riders that chased the nautiloid. They are the commissars and enforcers of my Queen Vlaakith's will.
hdb35709eg60d9g427fga5f4gdbbf8e68fd5d: Vlaakith bestows no greater honour. The bastard at the pass made a mockery of it.
h30380f54g1f25g4fd3g8f17g01e4b7394b9c: To wield a kith'rak's silver sword is my destiny.
h29decff3g58c2g4e06gac1dg8eafad1ad1de: I will earn my Queen's favour. And I will conquer every layer of Hell, should she command it.
h2c861841g1db1g4840gad8egddedbe67d821: Why were the kith'rak chasing the nautiloid?
h59bf9885g7df4g4a64gbbb6g3b127c61ae51: Why were these knights chasing the mind flayer ship?
h0eb96eb9g7525g4944g8fcag0fc544f38403: The ghaik are our mortal enemy. It is not unusual for the kith'rak to give chase.
hdf6ddbfeg9516g437cg9ea4gaa09613782d2: To penetrate the Hells? This is unusual.
h88e858b0gb4c1g4bb1ga119g67299c8ab411: But let us not question the wisdom of our Queen. We can see but to the horizon. Vlaakith's sight pierces the many planes.
h7dc6ee5bg1440g4c8cg8c17g5a629bc1cfac: The ghaik are my kind's mortal enemy. It is not unusual for the kith'rak to give chase.
h14710a3eg6b0dg4165gb36egc9be302c8d63: To penetrate the Hells? This is unusual.
ha589c11dgc89ag4c4aga218g80117ab9ea23: But I am not one to question the wisdom of my Queen. I can see but to the horizon. Vlaakith's sight pierces the many planes.
h2f284bbcgce67g4010g953dg5a9b8ee5de91: What are those dragons to the githyanki? Allies? Mounts? Pets?
he2b1ba91gc6e4g470agb58egf53826ac4ee7: They are gifts to my Queen from the goddess Tiamat herself. They reside in the great city of Tu'narath, awaiting the privilege of battle.
h4989533fgdf91g4779g8d79g3385b763f311: Do not pity them. They reap great riches from their service - gold and otherwise.
h5e7e9c16ge0b7g4b86gb85bg0a6f506d5886: Dragons' blood flows in you, does it not? Perhaps you might be availed of the... riches I offer.
h5c7b937cg7257g4a1egb5cdg99fd0fba6d97: Vlaakith bestows no greater honour. To wield a kith'rak's silver sword is my destiny.
hb650202fgcce1g4a48g9cbeg8d271158d8a2: Well we have no dragons at our disposal now, I'm afraid.
h09f76c99ge493g4eccg8043g8c3bb55293ae: I will sit astride one. It is only a matter of time.
h4390d76dg3c58g4b24gadd5gd859b57f01cd: I will ride a red dragon. I will wield the silver sword. And I will conquer every layer of Hell, should my Queen command it.
h73fb63bbgeb44g403egbc1fge3bca55f9797: I found Raphael rather impressive, even if you didn't.
h4581d6adgf10dg49e4g821bg25384312ad35: Steel and iron may be no match for him. But a githyanki knight's silver sword would pierce him through - even amid the fires of Avernus.
h944c6a75gc6e4g41cbg9326gb2ad1fbef6a8: I will ride a red dragon. I will wield the sword. And I will conquer every layer of Hell, should my Queen command it.
h14ad8e62ge4a3g497ag943dg44e2fb9ea767: He might lead us to a cure. Show him some respect - just in case.
h40916e80gf6acg44f1gb1e2gbcad5701ab56: Respect? Raphael plays a liar's game. Only my kin can purify us.
hafc085afgc63fg44c3g9ea1gd16e8579bcb3: Respect? Raphael plays a liar's game. Only my kin can purify us.
h8dc3626ag3c32g48f8ga50dga1b89ba88445: Yet he speaks one truth: we have yet to turn.
hf85dc5d4gd7d7g46e3g9a4bgc7978d113e81: He knows something. And I mean to know it too.
ha6b14ea5g3765g4afeg98feg3a7dd1bfa50e: You said 'kith'rak' before. What does that mean?
hd75c2543g984fg4b32g8dfdg935c775233cb: Those dragon riders - what do you know of them?
h70457868g0b0bg4393g99abg2c8a833410d7: They are githyanki knights, the commissars and enforcers of my Queen Vlaakith's will. To die in her name is their last act of reverence.
h601d1d83g2230g4715gb5f5g23453e1b295f: To wield a knight's silver sword is my destiny.
hdb89536cgdc6fg4f6bgb08agb5c1adf9126c: Recall the kith'raki you saw battle outside the nautiloid. Is knighthood your destiny?
h589d89acg6c4ag4789ga443g0e905b74df28: I was born to wield the kith'rak's silver sword.
h4394159dg2177g49ddg99e6ga9e6e8f27300: Vlaakith bestows no greater honour. I was born to wield the kith'rak's silver sword.
